preamble: The bilabial nasal [m] weakens to the voiceless labiodental fricative [f], a transformation involving lenition, devoicing, and a change in the place of articulation from bilabial to labiodental.

examples.note: Hypothesized lenition and devoicing in specific pre-consonantal contexts.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
